full_description: FocusForge is a productivity app designed to help you stay focused on your tasks and avoid distractions. The app features a Pomodoro timer, which allows you to work in concentrated 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. You can also schedule your tasks and set reminders to ensure you stay on track. Additionally, FocusForge includes a website blocking feature that prevents you from accessing distracting websites during your work sessions. With FocusForge, you can manage your time more efficiently, increase your productivity, and achieve your goals. The app is simple to use and provides a clean, intuitive interface that helps you stay organized and motivated. Whether you're a student, a professional, or simply someone looking to boost your productivity, FocusForge is the perfect tool to help you stay focused and achieve your objectives.
